description: Python wrapper for Kiwoom Securities (키움증권) OPEN API (REST) — Stock trading, balance, quotes, charts for Korean markets
rules: Always use REAL or MOCK constants for the host parameter, not raw URL strings
Use context manager (with/async with) for automatic cleanup
appkey and secretkey can be raw strings or file paths
Rate limits: REAL server = 5 req/s, MOCK server = 1 req/s — the library handles this automatically
All API responses include a .raw field for accessing the original API response data
For chart data, use ATS unified code format (e.g., '005930_AL') for stock_code
